name: modular-monolith
description: Modular Monolith: explicit module contracts, no cross-module internal access.

rules.guidance: Each module exposes only its public API (package, index, facade). Other modules import the public API, never internal packages or classes.
Cross-module direct access to internal types or DB tables is forbidden. Cross-module calls go through the module's public interface only.
Each module owns its data (schema, tables, storage). Other modules query through the module's service API or events, not by joining tables directly.
Module boundaries follow domain/business cohesion, not technical layers. Prefer modules named after capabilities (billing, inventory) over technical concerns (controllers, services).
